source: Dallas Police Divisions (official DPD Crime Analysis Unit layer, 8 divisions)
license: Public ArcGIS layer by DPD Crime Analysis Unit; disclaimer: graphical representation only, not survey-grade (State of Texas H.B. 1147)
method: identity — DPD crime records carry the police division name; uppercased values match the official polygon layer's DIVISION field verbatim, 8 of 8 (≈550 mixed-case source variants normalize to the same 8; no spatial join or approximation)
